title: Freedom (philosophy) - New World Encyclopedia
content: Freedomisvaluable for the individual and also for society. For the individualfreedomisa pre-requisite for spiritual and moral growth. A person who as they grow older is not given more and more responsibility and thefreedomthat goes with it does not fully mature. Human beings are treated as moral agents because they are held to be responsible for their actions. If a person is not free ...
